pageSubtitle: An executive read of the active tenant, combining finance, customers, services, and scheduling for {orgName}.

print.title: Printable and configurable report

print.empty: Select at least one block to generate the printable preview.

cover.description: This material consolidates the chosen indicators and slices for {orgName} in a format suitable for A4 paper and printed sharing.
